nishkriti.decision_reason: The canonical nine-chapter resolver now persists four source-bound passages. A lock-serialized one-second gpt-audio availability probe reached OpenAI but returned 429 insufficient_quota, so no synthesis or audition ran.
nishkriti.audiobook_next_action: Restore a release-valid listening judge, then run one bounded source-bound Nishkriti representative audition. Do not reuse or publish the retained unbound Azure-era audio.
nishkriti.bengali_audiobook_campaign_next_action: Restore OpenAI listening-QA billing/quota or approve a different independent audio judge, then use the four canonical passage hashes for one bounded audition.

radharani.decision_reason: Saaras v3 improved diagnostic normalized and phonetic scores, but all three raw scores remained below 9.7 and strict reanalysis found unexplained gaps in every sample. Sarvam supplied segment-only timing and local forced alignment was low-confidence, so no objective or downstream release gate passed.
radharani.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat Sarvam transcribe/verbatim, local Whisper base/medium, or stable-whisper base fingerprints. Keep audio hidden and require source-bound replacement narration or a genuinely different Bengali ASR plus measured alignment capability.
radharani.bengali_audiobook_campaign_next_action: Advance no Radharani provider retry; prepare the next source-bound title only after a usable listening judge is available.

book-edfcf810c5.decision_reason: The public reader, rights, sanitation, and audited graphical cover pair now pass non-paid preflight; audio remains hidden pending campaign policy gates and full QA.
book-edfcf810c5.audiobook_next_action: run a source-bound representative audition after the Bengali pilot and campaign-specific paid gates open

book-ef193ffc52.decision_reason: repair missing content/rights/covers before reader-only go-live

devdas.decision_reason: Public-domain provenance, source, sanitation, and audited graphical cover preflight now pass; no paid call or audio release occurred.
devdas.audiobook_next_action: run a source-bound representative audition after the Bengali pilot and campaign-specific paid gates open

pather-panchali.decision_reason: Reader access and sanitation pass, but repository evidence does not establish the required audio rights, canonical source proof, and cover authorization.
pather-panchali.audiobook_next_action: obtain the exact owner rights, source, and cover documents in the requirements packet before any paid audio work

jekyll-and-hyde.decision_reason: Public reader, public-domain rights, sanitation, graphical cover, and a hash-bound 138182-character private source input pass; Google ADC cannot refresh non-interactively.
jekyll-and-hyde.audiobook_next_action: Run gcloud auth application-default login, then execute one bounded source-bound representative audition; do not run full TTS unless every audition passage passes.

the-open-window.decision_reason: The Kokoro production candidate passed the authorized 9.2 listening gate and every objective, private-media, endpoint, disclosure, and real-browser playback gate without claiming a 10.0 listening score.
the-open-window.audiobook_next_action: Monitor production playback and keep the exact hash-bound candidate immutable; do not regenerate or substitute without a new full gate run.

sredni-vashtar.decision_reason: The canonical private reuse candidate passed full ASR, first/last, listening, measured sync, sidecar, manifest, and checksum gates; Railway returned HTTP 500 while uploading the merged backend archive, so production remains fail-closed.
sredni-vashtar.audiobook_next_action: Retry the Railway backend deployment, then require production manifest approval, proxy range 206, Book UI, and Reader UI validation before marking YES+YES.

dsires-baby.decision_reason: The retained Kokoro samples passed repaired ASR/source at 10.0 with exact ordered content, but three listening judgments were transport-invalid and the one audible maternal-dialogue judgment independently raised robotic, mechanical, choppy, and fallback-like fatal flags.
dsires-baby.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat the completed Kokoro fingerprints or treat transport-invalid zeroes as quality scores. Validate received source-bound narration, or authorize a materially different provider or voice lane, then run full ASR, listening, manifest, endpoint, frontend, and production gates.

the-cop-and-the-anthem.decision_reason: The hash-bound Kokoro af_bella representative reached ASR/source 10.0 with exact ordered content on all four samples, but independent listening fell to 8.3 overall and 0.85 confidence, below the English premium screen and the owner exact-10 target.
the-cop-and-the-anthem.audiobook_next_action: Do not repair or repeat the completed Kokoro af_bella configuration. Validate received source-bound narration or licensed audio, or authorize a materially different provider or voice representative lane, before full release QA.

the-last-leaf.decision_reason: The fallback-free af_sarah pilot passed opening and final passages at ASR/source 10.0/1.0, but Johnsy retained Sudie/suitie and the dialect passage retained multiple genuine content substitutions after unprompted beam and greedy decoding.
the-last-leaf.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat completed Last Leaf fingerprints. Validate received source-bound narration, or authorize a genuinely different voice/provider representative lane, before full release QA.

the-masque-of-the-red-death.decision_reason: The materially different bf_emma pilot passed only one of four passages after bounded decoder repair; missing source words, unexpected trailing speech, and substantive word substitutions remain.
the-masque-of-the-red-death.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat the bf_emma synthesis or ASR-repair fingerprints. Validate received source-bound narration, or authorize a genuinely different voice/provider representative lane, before full release QA.

the-necklace.decision_reason: The materially different af_sarah pilot retained exact content mismatches after prompted, unprompted beam, and greedy Whisper decoding: opening omitted had, while the final omitted I and decoded source is as has. Two other passages passed 10.0/1.0.
the-necklace.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat af_sarah or normalize the remaining content mismatches. Validate received source-bound narration or use a genuinely different voice/provider before any listening or full release QA.

the-monkeys-paw.decision_reason: Chirp3-HD-Achird passed representative QA and raw ASR, but the full candidate and one bounded ending repair both failed the all-samples listening gate
the-monkeys-paw.audiobook_next_action: Validate received source-bound narration or licensed audio against the packet before full release QA.

the-yellow-wallpaper.decision_reason: Studio-C and Chirp3-HD-Achird produced the same sub-threshold representative score pattern
the-yellow-wallpaper.audiobook_next_action: Validate received source-bound narration or licensed audio against the packet before full release QA.

the-gift-of-the-magi.decision_reason: The af_bella full title retained eight exact source/timestamp failures. A materially different bf_emma representative then passed only two of four passages after bounded decoder repair, retaining proper-name/spelling substitutions and an omitted three-word source phrase.
the-gift-of-the-magi.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat completed af_bella or bf_emma fingerprints. Keep Gift audio-hidden and require a genuinely different voice/provider or source-bound narration before another title-bound pilot.

the-tell-tale-heart.decision_reason: Three of four bf_emma passages reached exact ASR/source 10.0/1.0 after bounded decoder repair, but both finale decoders retained unexpected trailing phrase thanks for watching.
the-tell-tale-heart.audiobook_next_action: Do not repeat the bf_emma synthesis or ASR-repair fingerprints and never delete unexpected decoded speech to manufacture a pass. Use a genuinely different provider/voice or validate source-bound narration before another representative lane.
